items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.9.1 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.9.1 is now available.

This is a small maintenance update with a few quality-of-life improvements.

Syncthing start-on-boot detection has been improved so existing startup entries are now recognized correctly.

Syncthing also now includes an Open Web Config button, making it easier to access the web interface when the service is running.

The RA Viewer configurator now includes an Open in Browser button to help users find their RetroAchievements Web API key more easily.

The Connection tab news widget can now be shown or hidden, and this preference is saved in the app configuration.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
